zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillippa de Venables於大約1310年出生在英國時，她的父親Hugh de Venables55歲，母親Agatha de Vernon31歲。她和Adam de Hoghton至少有1個兒子。她去世在英國藍卡爾，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillippa de Venables于大约1310年出生在英国时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables55岁，母亲Agatha de Vernon31岁。她和Adam de Hoghton至少有1个儿子。她去世在英国藍卡爾，埋葬在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Phillippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillippa de Venables was born about 1310, in England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 55 and her mother, Agatha de Vernon, was 31. She had at least 1 son with Adam de Hoghton. She died in Lancashire, England, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillippa de Venables est née environ 1310, à Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Vernon, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Adam de Hoghton. Elle est décédée à Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillippa de Venables um 1310 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 55 und ihre Mutter Agatha de Vernon 31. Sie hatte mit Adam de Hoghton mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillippa de Venables è nata il circa 1310 nel England, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Agatha de Vernon, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Adam de Hoghton. Morì nel Lancashire, England, e fu sepolta a Lancashire, England.

ja.Preston, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアプレストン

ja.lifeSummary: Phillippa de Venablesが約1310年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは55歳，母Agatha de Vernonは31歳であった。彼女はAdam de Hoghtonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスランカシュアイアで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillippa de Venables(이)가 대략 1310년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Vernon(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Adam de Hoghton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 랭카실르에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillippa de Venables nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Vernon, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Adam de Hoghton. Ela faleceu em Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillippa de Venables родилась около 1310 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Vernon, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Adam de Hoghton. Она умерла в местности ланкашир, Англия и была похоронена в местности ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillippa de Venables nació aproximadamente 1310, en Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Agatha de Vernon, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Adam de Hoghton. Murió en Lancashire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Lancashire, Inglaterra.
